meaning: n.(战时特准攻击敌方商船的)武装民船,私掠船
examples: All but the privateer died in the shipwreck.
Several privateer often cruise near the entrance of the channel.
As a privateer he spent his time raiding the French along the West African coastline..
He bought a Privateer with twin 150hp engines and sank a tow post into the stern.
Also look for the Pride of Baltimore II, a 100-foot replica of a 19th-century privateer schooner.
